### General 
- Language Selection
	- ScanImage Python Utilities
	- Parallel Processing
	- Multithreading
 
 - .tiff need to be sequentially loaded into memory
- .hdf5 do not
- Structure for use with "grid searches"
 
---
### Code

- Modularity for future changes
